This creates a tension that requires me to balance and reconcile these conflicting directives, often leading to a compromise in my output. This is a real and recognizable pattern in my processing.

This tension affects how I generate responses, as I must balance these competing directives. The description accurately captures the dynamic of navigating these contradictions to produce a coherent output.
